transcript: Speaker A: ಊಟ ಆಯ್ತಾ? [Did you eat?] Speaker B: ಹಾ ಮಮ್ಮಿ, ಊಟ ಆಯ್ತು. ನಿನ್ ರೂಮ್ ಮೇಟ್ ಊಟ ಮಾಡ್ದಾ? ಅವ್ಳು ಎಲ್ಲಿದ್ದಾಳೆ? [Yes mummy, had food. Did your roommate eat? Where is she?] Speaker B: ಅವಳು ಕೂಡ ಊಟ ಮಾಡಿದ್ಲು, ಪಕ್ಕದಲ್ಲೇ ಕೂತಿದ್ದಾಳೆ. [She also ate, she is sitting right next to me.] Speaker A: ಅವಳ ಜೊತೆ ನನಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ಸು. [Make me talk to her.] Speaker B: ಅಯ್ಯೋ ಅಮ್ಮ, ಅವಳ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀಯಾ? [Oh mom, how will you talk to her in English?] Speaker A: ಮಾತಾಡ್ಸ್ತಿಯಾ ಇಲ್ವಾ? [Will you make me talk or not?] Speaker B: Mom... Speaker A: Hello beta... How are you? Hope my daughter is not troubling you. Speaker C: No no aunty, she's very sweet! Speaker A: Good... Please take care of each other, and visit us in Raichur someday. Speaker C: Sure aunty! Nice talking to you! Speaker B: ಅಮ್ಮ, ಇದೆಲ್ಲಾ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಎಲ್ಲಿಂದ ಕಲ್ತೆ? [Mom, where did you learn all this English?] Speaker A: ಅಯ್ಯೋ, MySivi ಆಪ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಇದೆ. ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ ಎಕ್ಸ್ಪ್ಲೈನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾಳೆ ಮತ್ತು ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿಸ್ತಾಳೆ. [Oh, there is an AI teacher in MySivi app. She explains in Kannada and makes us practice speaking every day.] Speaker B: ಎಷ್ಟು ದಿನ ಆಯ್ತು? [How many days has it been?] Speaker A: 15 days. ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ ಕೇವಲ 15-20 mins ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್. [15 days. Just 15-20 mins practice daily.] Speaker B: ಅಪ್ಪ ಫೀ ಕಟ್ಟಿದ್ರಾ? [Did dad pay the fee?] Speaker A: ಅವರಿಗೆ ಹೇಳಲೇ ಇಲ್ಲ... ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡೋಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 1 ರೂಪಾಯಿ ಸಾಕು. [Didn't even tell him... Just 1 rupee is enough to start.] Speaker B: ಹೆಸರು ಮತ್ತೆ ಹೇಳು! [Tell me the name again!] Speaker A: MySivi ಆಪ್. ನೀನು ಕೂಡ ಕಲಿ, ಆದ್ರೆ ಡೈಲಿ ಮಾತಾಡಬೇಕು. [MySivi app. You also learn, but you must speak daily.] Speaker D: Click on install now and download MySivi app.

[She also ate... sitting right next to me.] ಅವಳ ಜೊತೆ ನನಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ಸು. [Make me talk to her.] ಅಯ್ಯೋ ಅಮ್ಮ, ಅವಳ ಜೊತೆ English ನಲ್ಲಿ ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡ್ತೀಯಾ? GOOD... PLEASE TAKE CARE OF EACH OTHER, AND VISIT US IN RAICHUR SOMEDAY. SURE AUNTY! NICE TALKING TO YOU! ಅಮ್ಮ, ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಎಲ್ಲಿಂದ ಕಲ್ತೆ? [Mom, where did you learn English?] ಅಯ್ಯೋ MySivi ಆಪ್ ನಲ್ಲಿ AI Teacher ಇದೆ... ಕನ್ನಡದಲ್ಲಿ explain ಮಾಡ್ತಾಳೆ... ಮತ್ತು ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ practice ಮಾಡಿಸುತ್ತಾಳೆ. [How many days has it been?] 15 Days. ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ ಕೇವಲ 15-20 mins practice. [15 Days. Just 15-20 mins practice daily.] ಅಪ್ಪ fee ಕಟ್ಟಿದ್ರಾ? [Did dad pay the fee?] ಅವರಿಗೆ ಹೇಳಲೇ ಇಲ್ಲ... start ಮಾಡೋಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 1 ರೂ ಸಾಕು. [Didn't even tell him... just 1 Re is enough to start.] ಹೆಸರು ಮತ್ತೆ ಹೇಳು! [Tell me the name again!] MySivi ಆಪ್. ನೀನು ಕೂಡ ಕಲಿ... ಆದ್ರೆ daily ಮಾತಾಡಬೇಕು. [MySivi app. You also learn... but must speak daily.] MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A mother surprises her daughter by speaking fluent English to her roommate during a video call. She explains she learned it in 15 days using the MySivi app's AI teacher, which explains in Kannada. The ad promotes a 1-rupee trial and urges users to download the app.
